creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150997
patch

This patch fixes the problem.  It basically reverts https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/commit/bfc0da2e729c4361c8749a9f325bad517c0a7f7c

I use queries like '%o %B' to figure out which ports use a particular library, e.g.

pkg query '%o %B' | grep libpng15
